'''Circarpous X''' was a [[Water/Legends|frozen]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] with a traffic monitoring station.

The tenth planet in the Circarpous system, and was home to a small outpost colony with possible [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sympathizers. There was also a monitoring station there, which interrogated all large traffic moving through the system. Their [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] were geared toward [[Star Cruiser/Legends|star cruisers]] and other large [[Starship/Legends|ships]], but an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] or two could slip past.
